notes: Only discovered service names and endpoint names are valid.
This widget plans and validates only; it does not execute file mutations in V1.

bash.dry_run: curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/dry-run -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"script":"ServiceRegistry.scan(save_to: \"registry.json\") -> ProjectForge.forge_project(parent_path: \".\", project_name: \"Demo\", dependencies: [\"numpy\"], type: \"microservice\")","client_symbol_hash":"<symbol_hash>"}'

powershell.dry_run:
$body = @{ script = 'ServiceRegistry.scan(save_to: "registry.json") -> ProjectForge.forge_project(parent_path: ".", project_name: "Demo", dependencies: ["numpy"], type: "microservice")'; client_symbol_hash = '<symbol_hash>' } | ConvertTo-Json
Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1/dry-run' -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body
